description: Wondering how to better your healthy walks? Well, fila has a solution. Slip into the fila Intense shoes and watch your feet walk in absolute style and comfort.UpperAbrasion resistant and heavily meshed upper for absolute breathabilityFila breathable membrane to keep moisture at baySynthetic overlays strategically placed for added shoe structureCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitHeavily padded collar and plush tongue for snug fitMidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day in-step comfortFull length phylon midsole compression for absolute impact protection and to maintain stabilityOutsoleMade of durable rubber to withstand excessive usage, with a plastic trusstic shank on the midfoot for ergonomic comfortFlex grooves on the forefoot region for added flexibility and tractionMulti-directional lugs and grooves for absolute grip on various terrainImpact guidance lines for great traction, with a scooped heel for cushioning to the back footShoe careDo not machine washWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustStore away from direct sunlight
